residency_notes: Global Vertex endpoint. Google notes that the global endpoint does not provide regional ML-processing control.
regional_pricing_notes: Global is the default Vertex endpoint offer. For generally available Gemini 3 and later model families, non-global endpoint pricing takes effect on July 1, 2026. Before July 1, 2026, Google states that Global endpoint pricing applies to non-global endpoints.
prompt_training_notes: Google Cloud says Vertex AI customer data is not used to train or fine-tune AI/ML models without prior permission or instruction, though some abuse-monitoring and short-lived caching scenarios can still apply.
